/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=0 -g -O2 -Wall -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pt_ocl.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,pt_ocl.so -o pytorch_ocl/pt_ocl.so CMakeFiles/pt_ocl.dir/src/pointwise_ops.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pt_ocl.dir/src/tensor_ops.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pt_ocl.dir/src/vision_ops.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pt_ocl.dir/src/loss_ops.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pt_ocl.dir/src/random_ops.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pt_ocl.dir/src/norm_ops.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pt_ocl.dir/src/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pt_ocl.dir/src/registeration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pt_ocl.dir/src/CLTensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pt_ocl.dir/src/guard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pt_ocl.dir/src/python_iface.cpp.o   -L/lib/intel64  -L/lib/intel64_win  -L/lib/win-x64  -Wl,-rpath,/lib/intel64:/lib/intel64_win:/lib/win-x64:/home/me/miniforge3/envs/pytart/lib/python3.1/site-packages/torch/lib:/home/me/development/pytorch_dlprim/build/dlprimitives/CLBlast:/home/me/development/pytorch_dlprim/build/dlprimitives/CLBlast/tart:/home/me/development/pytorch_dlprim/build/dlprimitives/CLBlast/tart/subprocess/subprocess: /home/me/miniforge3/envs/pytart/lib/python3.1/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so /home/me/miniforge3/envs/pytart/lib/python3.1/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so dlprimitives/libdlprim_core.a /usr/lib/libpython3.14.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/me/miniforge3/envs/pytart/lib/python3.1/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed /home/me/miniforge3/envs/pytart/lib/python3.1/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/me/miniforge3/envs/pytart/lib/python3.1/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed dlprimitives/CLBlast/libclblast.so.1.6.3 dlprimitives/CLBlast/tart/libtart.so /usr/lib/libvulkan.so dlprimitives/CLBlast/tart/subprocess/subprocess/libsubprocess.so -lstdc++fs -ldl
